name: Paddle
description: Monitor Paddle subscription and payment platform for billing access and merchant compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Paddle at https://vendors.paddle.com
2. Go to Developer Tools → Authentication → API Keys
3. Generate a new API key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Paddle Developer Tools → Authentication → API Keys

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies Paddle merchant account is active and billing platform is secured
